{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205529991E6DE475C1D55A2DC9"}"},"total":729},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7435714345890743064","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了感觉挺不错，看多了戾气重的四合院同人文，一开始那几张确实会觉得不咋好看，但慢慢看到后面就好起来了，怎么说呢？主角虽然有挂，但走的确是用脑子的路线，没有出现什么祖宗人情节，看多了四合院祖宗人，偶尔看看主配都带脑子的也挺不错的，虽然有时候并不多就是了哈哈","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":16,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774270529D55A2DC9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227435714345890743064%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227330595523600059454%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731274547,"group_id":"7330595523600059454","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"想到哪儿就写到哪儿吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2RcZWdrnws0Flr3A93MXgI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c0438a45a39a4399a508efe9ed95b189~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787512&x-signature=BnAuzsbsCRvIXxQ9iN2gcWQRdA8%3D","user_id":"316258714650615","user_name":"木子大枕头"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"316258714650615","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1725972026,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7330595523600059454","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名
道德素质没有的，缺德人生我享受
【综影】【老六】
怎样才能对付院里的禽兽？自然是比禽兽更禽兽！
非正统年代，四合院爽文，主角腹黑、阴险、不当人，圣母、卫道士勿入。
您是否已经看够了各种光伟正的主角，每次都要等别人先惹自己才肯反击，甚至连收女都要找个贾东绿、许大帽得罪自己的借口才敢下手。
如果你也这样认为的话请看这本！
红柿子老司机作者王鸿涛来到了禽满四合院，随行还带了个老六系统（使人破防即能获得透视点，可看透万物）
从此开始了不当人的生活。
先渣秦京茹，再cos许大茂 play……
主打一个只要我不讲道德，就谁也别想绑架我！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/117996ba77c0c7de7f173c8527a0e812","author":"西门雨柱","author_id":"","book_id":"7330595523600059454","book_name":"老司机魂穿四合院，众禽瑟瑟发抖","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#781820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7330595585742881342","read_count":"25921","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1157287"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"531","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,腹黑,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/66c5d9857cde526b8723f91fbe4cdb6e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454529&x-signature=AvNdN44wpJROO2Ag8nETIQRzvLs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"884479266133325","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"605"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205529991E6DE475C1D55A2DC9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"r
